title: GameStop Q4 2024 Earnings Summary
text: GameStop reported $1.283 billion in quarterly revenue for Q4 2024, falling short of analyst expectations of $1.48 billion. The company delivered $0.29 per share, significantly exceeding the projected $0.08 per share. The gaming retailer demonstrated mixed financial performance. While missing on the top line, management significantly exceeded expectations on profitability metrics. The company achieved back-to-back annual profits in both 2024 and 2023, signaling improved operational efficiency. Following the earnings announcement, GME stock climbed considerably in after-hours trading. The share price rose from its closing level of $25.44 to reach highs of $27.20 during extended hours, reflecting investor enthusiasm over the stronger-than-anticipated earnings performance despite revenue shortfalls.
